base_size.note: Varies - happiness bar is 120x2px, care buttons are 8x8px each

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.screen_position: Lower right at x=120px, y=108px when care menu is visible (popup)
context.usage_scenario: Appears when player taps screen to open care menu. Tapping this button triggers echo_happy animation with heart particles. Button grays out during cooldown period. Part of 3-button care menu popup.

visual_specification.shape: Square button 8x8px. Contains hand icon (5x5px) centered inside.

animation.description: 2 states: Active state: hand icon in #FFCCAA (skin tone). Disabled state: hand icon in #5F574F (gray). State changes based on cooldown timer.

visual_specification.details: Button: 8x8px square, #1D2B53 background. Hand icon: 5x5px simple hand/palm shape centered. Active: icon #FFCCAA. Disabled: icon #5F574F. Position: x=120px, y=108px. Touch target: full 8x8px area. Hand design: simplified palm (3x3px) + thumb (2px extension).

relationships.differences_from: Unlike feed button: hand icon (not seed), skin tone color. Unlike clean button: rightmost position in menu. Unlike happiness bar: interactive button.
